title: Person B Update: Phase 0-1
scope: Progress summary for Track B (Person B) covering Phase 0 Wave 0 and Phase 1 Wave 1 deliverables. Documents completed B-side foundations including audio scaffolding, Vietnamese normalization, ASR wrapper, mic capture/VAD, and scenario corpus.
key_decisions: Short pauses in numeric fields are tolerated so multi-part plate inputs (e.g. '30F' and '1234') are treated as one input
Phase 2 can build on Phase 1 interfaces without changing the public API
Gate 0 B-side dependencies are complete; full gate also depends on A-side dialogue work
completed_items: Phase 0 / Wave 0 / Gate 0: B-side architecture write-up added to docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
Phase 0 / Wave 0 / Gate 0: Frozen schema plate/phone validation support for B normalization flow
Phase 0 / Wave 0 / Gate 0: Audio scaffolding filled with import-safe implementations (faster_whisper_asr.py, recorder.py, vad.py, playback.py)
Phase 1 / Wave 1 / Gate 1 - B10: Vietnamese normalization with unit tests
Phase 1 / Wave 1 / Gate 1 - B11: ASR wrapper with file-mode support
Phase 1 / Wave 1 / Gate 1 - B12: Microphone capture + VAD
Phase 1 / Wave 1 / Gate 1 - B13: Scenario corpus for G_1 through G_5 plus exception cases
Phase 1 / Wave 1 / Gate 1 - B14: Audio fixture support for WER evaluation readiness
Verification: 17 pytest tests passed, JSON fixtures in scenarios/ parse successfully, import check for audio/normalization modules succeeded
